name: WeebCentral
description: Explore Weeb Central for top manga titles, hidden gems, and the latest releases. Join our community of manga enthusiasts!

name: MangaDex
description: Read comics and manga online at MangaDex, with high quality images and support creators and translators!

name: AnimePlanet
description: Anime-Planet is a site created by fans, for fans. Though millions of users a month use the site, we're staffed by only a small team of volunteers including the founder, developers, and content moderators.
